title: Second Battle of Ord Biniir

{{Quote|Y-wing pilots bragged of their great victory at the First Battle of Ord Biniir. Of the Second Battle of Ord Biniir, they say little. Perhaps it is because few of them survived to brag. Then again, perhaps they knew that battle was insignificant.|[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] Soontir Fel|<ref name="The Making of Baron Fel" />}}
The '''Second Battle of Ord Biniir''', also simply known as the '''Battle of Ord Biniir''', took place in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A few days prior, a [[Unidentified Rebel strike force|group]] of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing starfighters]] had managed to capture the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ord Biniir/Legends|Ord Biniir]] from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] control in the [[First Battle of Ord Biniir]]. In response, the Empire launched an operation to retake Ord Biniir, which included the [[2/181st|second squadron]] of the [[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Wing]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]]. With the help of the 2/181st, the Imperial counterattack was a success, and the Empire wiped out the Rebel forces occupying Ord Biniir. Although the battle was only a minor victory, it took place the same day as the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]], causing Imperial [[Propaganda/Legends|propaganda]] to mark the Second Battle of Ord Biniir as a major victory and to regard Fel as a hero of the Empire.

==Prelude==
{{Quote|A wing lost it and a squadron is being sent to take it back?|Captain Soontir Fel, prior to the battle|<ref name="The Making of Baron Fel" />}}
In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], the Alliance successfully took the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ord Biniir/Legends|Ord Biniir]]<ref name="The Making of Baron Fel" /> in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="The Essential Atlas" /> from Imperial control in the [[First Battle of Ord Biniir]]. The battle—which pitted the Empire's [[233rd Imperial Fighter Group]] against a [[Unidentified Rebel strike force|large force]] of Alliance [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]]—was a resounding victory for the Rebellion, and the Empire subsequently planned to launch an operation to retake Ord Biniir.<ref name="The Making of Baron Fel" />

Part of the operation involved air cover provided by the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] of the [[2/181st|second squadron]] of the [[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Wing]], led by the disgraced [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]]. Fel had previously been a flight instructor at the Empire's [[Imperial Naval Academy/Legends|Prefsbelt Fleet Camp]] when several of his former trainees defected to the Alliance, and, as a result, he was transferred over to the disreputable 181st. However, upon taking command of the 2/181st, Fel transformed his new [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] into a respectable fighting unit fit for battle.<ref name="The Making of Baron Fel" />

Shortly before the battle, the captured Rebel sympathizer [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] claimed that the Alliance's [[Alliance High Command/Legends|main base]] was on the planet [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]], near Ord Biniir. With the Imperial task force already on its way to Ord Biniir, Imperial [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] ordered a detachment of the task force to inspect Dantooine to see if Organa's statement was true. The task force complied with their new orders, and the detachment soon discovered that the [[Dantooine base/Legends|Dantooine base]] was in fact abandoned.<ref name="The Essential Atlas" />

==The battle==
{{Quote|Seven, stay with your wing, help each other.|Captain Soontir Fel, issuing orders to his squadron during the battle|<ref name="The Making of Baron Fel" />}}
The Empire soon launched its invasion of Ord Biniir, with the 2/181st engaging the Rebellion's Y-wing [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] defending the planet. Despite the Rebel starfighters previously defeating an entire wing, the 2/181st—thanks to Fel's leadership and guidance—were able to fight off the enemy Y-wings, destroying many of them. At the same [[Time/Legends|time]], Fel's squadron strafed a Rebel-controlled building protected by a number of [[anti-aircraft gun]]s, neutralizing resistance enough for the Empire to land its [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]], which dispensed [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to capture the rest of Ord Biniir. After intense fighting, the Empire had either [[Death/Legends|killed]] or captured the majority of the [[Rebel trooper/Legends|Alliance soldiers]] on Ord Biniir.<ref name="The Making of Baron Fel" />

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|Because of Rebel action beyond my control, my modest success became an Imperial event.|Colonel Soontir Fel, during his interrogation|<ref name="The Making of Baron Fel" />}}
By the end of the battle, Ord Biniir was once again under Imperial control, due in large part to Fel and the 2/181st. Although the skirmish was in reality a minor victory in the larger [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] conflict, the battle took place on the same day as the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], in which the Rebellion scored its largest triumph yet against the Empire by destroying the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], an Imperial [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] powerful enough to destroy an entire planet.<ref name="The Making of Baron Fel" />

Because of the crushing defeat at [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], Imperial [[Propaganda/Legends|propaganda]] glorified Fel's part in the Second Battle of Ord Biniir, hoping to distract the public's attention from the [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]] debacle. Fel was given the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Major/Legends|major]], and a very elaborate gala event that depicted him as a hero of the Empire was held for him on the [[Galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="The Making of Baron Fel" />

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Fel, by then an Imperial [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]], was captured by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Battle of Brentaal IV (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Brentaal IV]].<ref name="Empire's Service 4">[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 24|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 24]]</ref> In his interrogation by New Republic personnel following his capture, Fel recounted the events surrounding the Second Battle of Ord Biniir, as well as other portions of his life.<ref name="The Making of Baron Fel" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Second Battle of Ord Biniir was first mentioned in the twenty-second issue of the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series, [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 22|''In the Empire's Service, Part 2'']]. The battle was later expanded upon in the twenty-fifth issue of the same series, [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25|''The Making of Baron Fel'']], in a flashback sequence.

Ord Biniir's entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' states that the Second Battle of Ord Biniir was not widely celebrated by the Empire, as it occurred on the same day as the Battle of Yavin. However, this contradicts ''The Making of Baron Fel'', which states that because the battle took place on the same day as the Battle of Yavin, the Empire venerated its victory at Ord Biniir, even holding an award ceremony on Coruscant for Captain Fel. For consistency, this article assumes that the battle was widely celebrated.
